title: Decide the final research claim
what_was_done: Rewrote the final claim so the repository no longer suggests an AI energy win; the official story now says heuristic is best overall and ppo is the best AI policy with a mixed result.

title: Package one reproducible final evidence bundle
what_was_done: Added a canonical reviewer-facing bundle under artifacts/final_submission/matrix_v6 with a README, manifest, and traceability map.
remaining_work: The bundle intentionally references preserved artifacts instead of duplicating every historical raw file.

title: Unify setup and run instructions
what_was_done: Aligned the README, legacy command index, and submission overview around one official install/train/evaluate/demo path.
remaining_work: None for the official workflow docs.

title: Define a complete reproducible environment
what_was_done: Added tracked optional dependency groups for test and training dependencies, pinned the supported Python range in pyproject.toml, and aligned the docs with the verified python3.12 environment path.
remaining_work: None for the documented submission environment.

title: Make basic verification actually pass
what_was_done: Verified clean editable install in a fresh python3.12 venv, backend import, FastAPI TestClient health smoke, run_experiment.py, final_evaluation.py, pytest, and the frontend npm ci plus npm run build path.
remaining_work: None for the machine-verified submission checklist.

title: Resolve the Impact Predictor scope mismatch
what_was_done: Downgraded Impact Predictor to exploratory scope unless it is explicitly bundled and verified.
remaining_work: If Impact Predictor is promoted back into the final story, it still needs a real acceptance bundle.

title: Explain the real controller architecture honestly
what_was_done: Documented the simulator, explicit baseline controllers, PPO controller, API layer, and demo/internal tooling split in reviewer-facing docs.

title: Reconcile locked validation evidence with the final thesis result
what_was_done: Aligned the final thesis narrative with the official matrix result and tied that narrative back to locked validation artifacts through the final bundle traceability map.
remaining_work: None beyond continuing to cite the preserved official report as the authoritative shipped artifact.

title: Choose one canonical config family
what_was_done: Marked configs/train_*.json as canonical and moved reviewer guidance away from root-level historical config snapshots.
remaining_work: None for the official config story.

title: Mark legacy entrypoints and internal tools explicitly
what_was_done: Reframed COMMANDS.md as a legacy index and labeled the Streamlit dashboard as internal analyst tooling instead of the public demo path.

title: Fix demo fallback integrity
what_was_done: The frontend now tracks whether run data came from the backend or demo fallback and displays explicit notices when it is showing generated data or a generated topology layout.
remaining_work: None in the verified build path from this machine recheck.

title: Fix policy alias consistency across the frontend demo path
what_was_done: Demo normalization now uses the same alias map as the rest of the frontend, removing the previous baseline/noop mismatch.
remaining_work: None in the code path or build verification path.

what_was_done: Cleaned the official final-evaluation artifacts and reporting code so reviewer-facing outputs use repo-relative paths instead of personal machine paths.

title: Add a concise final architecture and artifact glossary
what_was_done: Added a compact final submission overview and artifact glossary, and reflected the same architecture summary in the README.

what_was_done: Added explicit responsible-design and limitations language around QoS gating, mixed results, and experimental scope.
